offer: For Shopify store owners processing 10–20 invoices/month, missed invoice due dates cause stock shortages. We send automated payment reminders instead of manual tracking with spreadsheets.
problem: Late payments to suppliers due to missed invoice due dates.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Shopify store owners
Indie Hackers discussions on invoice management
DM outreach to Shopify store owners with demo video
Engage in community forums for Shopify tools
try_it: Let users try invoice monitoring and dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing invoice data
